content:
# Numbers Chapter 35 -- The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 193-194; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pp. pa_0141-pa_0142 | **Source Image:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_035_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_035_page_002.jpg`

---

**35:1** And YHWH spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan, opposite Jericho, saying,

**35:2** "Command the sons of Israel that they give to the Levites from the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and pastureland for the cities all around them you shall give to the Levites.

**35:3** And the cities shall be for them to dwell in, and their pasturelands shall be for their livestock and for their goods and for all their animals.

**35:4** And the pasturelands of the cities which you shall give to the Levites shall extend from the wall of the city outward one thousand cubits all around.

**35:5** And you shall measure from outside the city on the eastern side two thousand cubits, and on the southern side two thousand cubits, and on the western side two thousand cubits, and on the northern side two thousand cubits, with the city in the middle. This shall be to them the pasturelands of the cities.

**35:6** And the cities which you shall give to the Levites shall be the six cities of refuge, which you shall give for the manslayer to flee there; and in addition to them you shall give forty-two cities.

**35:7** All the cities which you shall give to the Levites shall be forty-eight cities -- them and their pasturelands.

**35:8** And the cities which you shall give from the possession of the sons of Israel: from the many you shall give more, and from the few you shall give fewer. Each one according to his inheritance which he inherits shall give of his cities to the Levites."

**35:9** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,

**35:10** "Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them: When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

**35:11** then you shall select for yourselves cities -- cities of refuge they shall be for you -- and the manslayer who strikes a person unintentionally shall flee there.

**35:12** And the cities shall be for you a refuge from the avenger, so that the manslayer shall not die until he stands before the congregation for judgment.

**35:13** And the cities which you shall give, six cities of refuge they shall be for you.

**35:14** Three of the cities you shall give beyond the Jordan, and three of the cities you shall give in the land of Canaan; cities of refuge they shall be.

**35:15** For the sons of Israel and for the sojourner and for the resident among them, these six cities shall be for refuge, for anyone who strikes a person unintentionally to flee there.

**35:16** And if with an instrument of iron he struck him and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

**35:17** And if with a stone in hand by which one could die he struck him and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

**35:18** Or if with a wooden instrument in hand by which one could die he struck him and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

**35:19** The avenger of blood -- he himself shall put the murderer to death; when he encounters him, he shall put him to death.

**35:20** And if in hatred he pushed him, or hurled at him something with intent, and he died,

**35:21** or in enmity he struck him with his hand and he died, the one who struck him shall surely be put to death; he is a murderer. The avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he encounters him.

**35:22** But if suddenly, without enmity, he pushed him, or hurled upon him any instrument without intent,

**35:23** or with any stone by which one could die, without seeing him, and it fell upon him and he died, and he was not his enemy and was not seeking his harm,

**35:24** then the congregation shall judge between the one who struck and the avenger of blood according to these judgments.

**35:25** And the congregation shall deliver the manslayer from the hand of the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall return him to his city of refuge to which he had fled; and he shall dwell in it until the death of the high priest who was anointed with the holy oil.

**35:26** But if the manslayer shall indeed go out beyond the border of his city of refuge to which he fled,

**35:27** and the avenger of blood finds him outside the border of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood kills the manslayer -- there is no bloodguilt upon him.

**35:28** For in his city of refuge he shall dwell until the death of the high priest, and after the death of the high priest the manslayer shall return to the land of his possession.

**35:29** And these things shall be for you as a statute of judgment throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.

**35:30** Anyone who strikes a person -- by the mouth of witnesses shall the murderer be put to death; but one witness shall not testify against a person to put him to death.

**35:31** And you shall not take a ransom for the life of a murderer who is guilty of death, for he shall surely be put to death.

**35:32** And you shall not take a ransom for him who has fled to his city of refuge, to return to dwell in the land before the death of the priest.

**35:33** And you shall not pollute the land in which you are, for blood -- it pollutes the land, and no atonement can be made for the land for the blood that is shed in it, except by the blood of the one who shed it.

**35:34** And you shall not defile the land in which you dwell, in the midst of which I dwell, for I, YHWH, dwell in the midst of the sons of Israel."
